name: Code42 Incydr
description: Integrates with Code42 Incydr REST API for insider risk detection, file event monitoring, alert management, and case investigation of data exposure events

actions.name: Search File Events
actions.description: Search for file events across endpoints including file creation, modification, deletion, and exfiltration events

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date for the search (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date for the search (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: Filter by username or email address

parameters.name: eventType
parameters.description: Filter by event type (CREATED, MODIFIED, DELETED, READ_BY_APP)

parameters.name: riskIndicators
parameters.description: Comma-separated risk indicators to filter by

parameters.name: pgSize
parameters.description: Maximum number of events to return per page

actions.name: List Alerts
actions.description: Retrieve Incydr alerts for data exposure and insider risk events

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Filter alerts created after this date (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: Filter alerts created before this date (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Filter by alert state (OPEN, DISMISSED, PENDING, IN_PROGRESS)

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Filter by severity (CRITICAL, HIGH, MODERATE, LOW)

parameters.name: pgSize
parameters.description: Maximum number of alerts to return per page

actions.name: Get Alert Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific Incydr alert including associated file events

actions.name: List Cases
actions.description: Retrieve investigation cases for insider risk events

parameters.name: pgSize
parameters.description: Maximum number of cases to return per page

actions.name: Get Case Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific investigation case

actions.name: List Watchlists
actions.description: Retrieve all configured watchlists for monitoring departing employees and high-risk users
